analysis.body: {"wtf_version": "1.0", "provider": {"name": "AssemblyAI", "model": "universal-2", "language": "en-US"}, "channels": 4, "speakers": [{"speaker": "S0", "party": 0, "role": "agent", "talk_time_s": 410.0}, {"speaker": "S1", "party": 1, "role": "supervisor", "talk_time_s": 120.0}, {"speaker": "S2", "party": 2, "role": "customer", "talk_time_s": 540.0}, {"speaker": "S3", "party": 3, "role": "sme", "talk_time_s": 210.0}], "segments": [{"start": 3.2, "end": 11.7, "speaker": "S2", "text": "This is the third time I've been transferred and I just want a refund."}, {"start": 12.0, "end": 17.4, "speaker": "S0", "text": "I'm sorry \u2014 I'm bringing my supervisor onto the line right now."}, {"start": 17.6, "end": 24.1, "speaker": "S1", "text": "Hi Hilde, this is Reina, the supervisor. I'm reviewing the case now."}], "quality": {"overall_confidence": 0.88, "redaction_applied": true}}
Escalation: customer frustrated by repeated transfers; supervisor took over and authorized full refund of $1,184.00; SME confirmed the underlying duplicate-charge bug.
